mapper.select: SELECT HOLIDAY_TRX_YN, TRX_ID, OPER_MODE_TYPE, HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME, BIZDAY_TRX_YN, BIZ_GROUP_ID, BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_YN, SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME, TRX_STOP_YN, TRX_DESC, BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME, TRX_TYPE, RETRY_MI_CYCLE, SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME, TRX_NAME, RETRY_TRX_YN, HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME, MAX_RETRY_COUNT, TRX_STOP_REASON FROM FWK_TRX WHERE TRX_ID = #{trxId}

SELECT ORG_ID, TRX_ID, IO_TYPE, RES_MESSAGE_ID, STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID, HEX_LOG_YN, PROXY_RES_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, EXECUTE_SEQ, LEGACY_MESSAGE_ID, PROXY_RES_DATA, TIMEOUT_SEC, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, MESSAGE_ID, STD_MESSAGE_ID, MULTI_RES_TYPE, PROXY_RES_TYPE, MULTI_RES_YN, RES_TYPE_FIELD_ID FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE WHERE TRX_ID = #{trxId} ORDER BY ORG_ID, EXECUTE_SEQ

SELECT CUR_VERSION, ORG_ID, BIZ_DOMAIN, REQUEST_YN, HEADER_YN, MESSAGE_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, PRE_LOAD_YN, TRX_TYPE, MESSAGE_NAME, LOCK_YN, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_DESC, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOG_LEVEL FROM FWK_MESSAGE WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}

SELECT FIELD_TAG, DEFAULT_VALUE, ORG_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, VALIDATION_RULE_ID, MESSAGE_FIELD_DESC, CODE_MAPPING_YN, FILLER, TEST_VALUE, DATA_LENGTH, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, REQUIRED_YN, CODE_GROUP, FIELD_TYPE, ALIGN, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, MESSAGE_ID, SORT_ORDER, SCALE, LOG_YN, DATA_TYPE, USE_MODE, REMARK, MESSAGE_FIELD_ID FROM FWK_MESSAGE_FIELD WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT CUR_VERSION, ORG_ID, BIZ_DOMAIN, REQUEST_YN, HEADER_YN, MESSAGE_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, PARENT_MESSAGE_ID, PRE_LOAD_YN, TRX_TYPE, MESSAGE_NAME, LOCK_YN, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, MESSAGE_ID, MESSAGE_DESC, VALIDATION_USE_YN, LOG_LEVEL FROM FWK_MESSAGE WHERE MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY ORG_ID
SELECT CODE_GROUP_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, CODE_GROUP_NAME, CODE_GROUP_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME FROM FWK_CODE_GROUP WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId}
SELECT CODE, USE_YN, CODE_DESC, CODE_NAME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, SORT_ORDER, CODE_GROUP_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, CODE_ENGNAME FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} ORDER BY CODE

SELECT START_TIME, ORG_ID, BANK_STATUS_CHECK_YN, REQ_CHANNEL_CODE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, SVC_CONF_2, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, SVC_CONF_1, CLASS_NAME, BIZ_DAY_CHECK_YN, BIZDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, PRE_PROCESS_APP_ID, END_TIME, USE_YN, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, SERVICE_ID, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_YN, TIME_CHECK_YN, SATURDAY_SERVICE_START_TIME, SERVICE_NAME, SATURDAY_SERVICE_YN, TRX_ID, IO_TYPE, HOLIDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, BIZDAY_SERVICE_YN, SERVICE_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LOGIN_ONLY_YN, BANK_CODE_FIELD, SATURDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, POST_PROCESS_APP_ID, WORK_SPACE_ID, BIZDAY_SERVICE_END_TIME, METHOD_NAME, SERVICE_TYPE, SECURE_SIGN_YN FROM FWK_SERVICE WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}

SELECT RELATION_ETC1, RELATION_ETC2, COMPONENT_ID, RELATION_ETC3, RELATION_ETC4, SERVICE_ID, EXPRESSION, SERVICE_SEQ_NO, POST_CONDITION FROM FWK_SERVICE_RELATION WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} ORDER BY SERVICE_SEQ_NO
SELECT COMPONENT_ID, PARAM_VALUE, SERVICE_ID, PARAM_SEQ_NO, SERVICE_SEQ_NO FROM FWK_RELATION_PARAM WHERE SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId} ORDER BY SERVICE_SEQ_NO, PARAM_SEQ_NO
SELECT ERROR_LEVEL, ERROR_TITLE, ORG_ID, TRX_ID, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, ORG_ERROR_CODE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, ERROR_CODE FROM FWK_ERROR WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}

SELECT LOCALE_CODE, PB_ERROR_TITLE, ETC_ERROR_TITLE, ERROR_CAUSE_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, ERROR_GUIDE_DESC, ERROR_CODE, ERROR_TITLE, HELP_PAGE_URL, CMS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC, ETC_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, IBS_ERROR_GUIDE_DESC FROM FWK_ERROR_DESC WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode} ORDER BY LOCALE_CODE

SELECT CUR_VERSION, DEFAULT_VALUE, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_DESC, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, DATA_TYPE, VALID_DATA, PROPERTY_NAME FROM FWK_PROPERTY WHERE PROPERTY_ID = #{propertyId} ORDER BY PROPERTY_GROUP_ID

SELECT COMPONENT_ID, COMPONENT_CREATE_TYPE, USE_YN, COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, BIZ_GROUP_ID, COMPONENT_TYPE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, COMPONENT_DESC, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME FROM FWK_COMPONENT WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId}

SELECT START_TIME, ASYNC_YN, BIZ_DOMAIN, BANK_STATUS_CHECK_YN, BIZ_GROUP_ID, WARNING_END_DTIME, MENU_ID, STOP_REASON_START_DTIME, BIZ_DAY_CHECK_YN, ENCRIPTION_YN, WARNING_START_DTIME, CRM_LOG_TYPE1, MENU_URL, END_TIME, USE_YN, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, WARNING_EN, CRM_LOG_TYPE2, CRM_LOG_TYPE3, WEB_APP_ID, TIME_CHECK_YN, WARNING_KO, STOP_REASON_KO, STOP_REASON_EN, VALIDATION_MESSAGE_ID, E_CHANNEL_CODE, ECRM_DESC, STOP_REASON_END_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LOGIN_ONLY_YN, BANK_CODE_FIELD, IN_OUT_MESSAGE_ID, HDAY_END_TIME, IN_OUT_USE_YN, HDAY_START_TIME, URL_PATTERN, LOG_YN, INPUT_TYPE, MENU_NAME, APP_TYPE, SECURE_SIGN_YN FROM FWK_CUST_MENU_APP WHERE MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}
